endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/privateEndpointConnections
endpoints.description: Gets all private endpoint connections on a server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname.
